case_title: RITA LARK VS. NEIL CALLOWAY et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LARK, RITA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDEG PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY LARK, RITA CALLOWAY, NEIL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CALLOWAY, NEIL
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-03-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,850.00 FILED BY LARK, RITA AS TO DEFENDANT CALLOWAY, NEIL PUBLIC STORAGE FRANCHISE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-24-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-12-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT PUBLIC STORAGE FRANCHISE, INC.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LARK, RITA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PUBLIC STORAGE FRANCHISE, INC. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE PUBLIC STORAGE WAS NEGLIGENT. DEFENDANT NEIL CALLOWAY DISMISSED AS IMPROPERLY NAMED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-24-2009 - JUDGMENT.
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LARK, RITA
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF LARK, RITA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-24-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-24-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT NEIL CALLOWAY PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANT NEIL CALLOWAY APPEARS FOR PUBLIC STORAGE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO NEIL CALLOWAY BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-24-2009 AT 10:00AM.
